scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix .. run build:electron && node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none search-files.unit.mjs page-index.unit.mjs sync-conflict-protection.unit.mjs workspace-store.unit.mjs
scripts.test:chat-ui: node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none chat-ui-migration.unit.mjs chat-stream-handling.unit.mjs chat-style-cleanup.unit.mjs chat-empty-task-lazy-create.unit.mjs markdown-typography.unit.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api && npm run test:chat-ui
